case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. PATRICIA MABEL MARTIR DE RUANO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-14-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-14-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-16-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE: JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. - PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIEIORO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT PATRICIA MABEL; MARTIR DE RUANO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
